summary: This document is a Minimal Financial Assistance Declaration letter addressed to Eduardo Lizana of KeepMeCompany regarding UK Subsidy Control Act 2022 compliance. It outlines eligibility criteria for receiving £850 in aid and details the £315,000 threshold over a rolling three-year period. The document requires the recipient to disclose previous subsidies to ensure compliance with cumulation rules.
